title: Bulgur Pilaf with Smoky Flavor
description: A hearty and flavorful bulgur pilaf with a smoky twist, perfect for a satisfying lunch.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in smoky paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add bulgur and wheat pilaf, stirring to combine with the onion mixture.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
